query.description: The tracing spans query to execute.

after.description: Keyset pagination cursor from a previous timestamp-ordered response.

dateRange.description: Date range for the query. Defaults to last hour.

date_from.description: Start of the date range. Accepts ISO 8601 timestamps or relative formats: -1h, -6h, -1d, -7d, etc.

date_to.description: End of the date range. Same format as date_from. Omit or null for "now".

excludeAttributes.description: Omit the per-span attributes and resource attributes maps from results to keep payloads compact. Defaults to false.

key.description: Attribute key. For type "span", use built-in fields (trace_id, span_id, duration, name, kind, status_code, is_root_span). For "span_attribute"/"span_resource_attribute", use the attribute key (e.g. "http.method").

operator.description:
Comparison operator.

* `exact` - exact
* `is_not` - is_not
* `icontains` - icontains
* `not_icontains` - not_icontains
* `regex` - regex
* `not_regex` - not_regex
* `gt` - gt
* `lt` - lt
* `is_set` - is_set
* `is_not_set` - is_not_set

type.description:
"span" filters built-in span fields. "span_attribute" filters span-level attributes. "span_resource_attribute" filters resource-level attributes.

* `span` - span
* `span_attribute` - span_attribute
* `span_resource_attribute` - span_resource_attribute

value.description: Value to compare against. String, number, or array of strings. Omit for is_set/is_not_set operators.

flatSpans.description: Return the matching spans themselves, one row per span (root and child), instead of collapsing to traces. Use this to search by a child-span attribute (e.g. code.filepath) without the whole-trace grouping. Distinct from rootSpans. Defaults to false.

offset.description: Pagination offset, used when ordering by a column (e.g. duration). Defaults to 0.

orderBy.description:
Column to order by. Defaults to timestamp. Ordering by timestamp paginates via the keyset cursor ('after'); ordering by duration paginates via 'offset'.

* `timestamp` - timestamp
* `duration` - duration

orderDirection.description:
Order direction. Defaults to DESC (e.g. timestamp+DESC = newest first, duration+DESC = slowest first).

* `ASC` - ASC
* `DESC` - DESC

personId.description: Show spans for a given person (person UUID). Expanded server-side to the person's distinct IDs and matched against the team's configured distinct-id span attribute (see the tracing_config endpoint; defaults to 'posthogDistinctId').

prefetchSpans.description: Number of child spans to prefetch per trace (1-100).

rootSpans.description: Filter to root spans only. Defaults to true.

statusCodes.description: Filter by OTel span status codes (0 Unset, 1 OK, 2 Error) — not HTTP status codes. Use [2] to select error spans.

traceId.description: Filter to a specific trace ID (hex string).
